summary: Tested both Product 1 (Partner Signup Address) and Product 2 (WorkDrive Integration). Backend: 25/28 tests passed (3 skipped - partner code not found, intermittent rate limit). Frontend: Cloud Storage category filter was missing from IntegrationsOverview.tsx - fixed. Critical issue: SettingsTab (with OrgAddressSection) is NOT integrated into Admin.tsx - feature unreachable.

minor.issue: Provided partner credentials admin@ligerinc.local don't exist in DB. Test skipped. Used TEST_valid_iter133@test.local / test-org-iter133-valid instead.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: SettingsTab (which contains OrgAddressSection) is defined and exported from SettingsTab.tsx but is NEVER imported or rendered in Admin.tsx. There is no 'settings' tab in Admin.tsx. OrgAddressSection is completely unreachable from the admin panel.

React Rules of Hooks violation: useEffect hooks (lines 27-39) are called AFTER a conditional 'if (isPlatformAdmin) return null' (line 25). This can cause React invariant violations if isPlatformAdmin ever changes from true to false or vice versa during the component lifecycle.

fixed_issues.issue: CategoryFilter TypeScript type and the category sidebar array were missing 'cloud_storage'. Type was 'all|payments|email|crm|accounting'. Cloud Storage category button was not showing in the sidebar even though zoho_workdrive, google_drive, and onedrive integrations are returned by the backend.
fixed_issues.fix: Added 'cloud_storage' to CategoryFilter type (line 138) and to the sidebar filter array (line 737). Now 'Cloud Storage (3)' filter button appears and shows WorkDrive (Connect), Google Drive (Coming Soon), OneDrive (Coming Soon).

backend.GET /api/website-settings includes workd: PASS - field exists and is boolean
backend.GET /api/oauth/integrations cloud_storag: SKIPPED (intermittent rate limit on last test)

frontend.Admin OrgAddressSection visible in Setti: FAIL - SettingsTab not rendered in Admin.tsx

test_credentials.test_partner_admin: TEST_valid_iter133@test.local / ChangeMe123! / partner_code: test-org-iter133-valid (created by test suite)
test_credentials.provided_partner_credentials_status: admin@ligerinc.local does NOT exist in the database

action_items: CRITICAL: Import and integrate SettingsTab into Admin.tsx. Add a 'settings' tab to Admin.tsx sidebar and TabsContent, OR embed OrgAddressSection directly inside WebsiteTab or another existing tab. Currently OrgAddressSection is completely unreachable.

MEDIUM: Fix React Rules of Hooks violation in OrgAddressSection - move the 'if (isPlatformAdmin) return null' AFTER all hook declarations (both useState and useEffect), OR move useEffect hooks above the conditional return.
LOW: The provided partner credentials (admin@ligerinc.local / ligerinc) do not exist in the database. If these are expected to be seeded, add them to the seed data.
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsTab.tsx is completely disconnected from Admin.tsx - SettingsTab export is unused (dead component). OrgAddressSection feature is built but inaccessible.
React Rules of Hooks violation in OrgAddressSection: useEffect hooks appear after conditional return statement (line 25 before lines 27-39). Must move early return to AFTER all hook declarations.
IntegrationsOverview.tsx CategoryFilter type was missing 'cloud_storage' - fixed. Always update both type definition AND usage arrays when adding new categories.
seed_data_creation: Created test partner org via register-partner API: name='TEST_Org_Iter133_Valid', admin_email='TEST_valid_iter133@test.local', partner_code='test-org-iter133-valid', password='ChangeMe123!'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter133 added Partner Signup Address fields (working) and Zoho WorkDrive integration. Key bug: SettingsTab.tsx was never imported into Admin.tsx so OrgAddressSection is unreachable - E1 needs to add it. Cloud Storage category filter in IntegrationsOverview was fixed (added 'cloud_storage' to CategoryFilter type and sidebar array). Test partner: TEST_valid_iter133@test.local / ChangeMe123! / test-org-iter133-valid.

SettingsTab_not_integrated.root_cause: SettingsTab.tsx was modified to add OrgAddressSection but SettingsTab component was never imported or added to Admin.tsx's tab list/content
SettingsTab_not_integrated.reproduction: Login as partner admin → go to /admin → no 'Settings' tab exists in sidebar → OrgAddressSection is inaccessible
SettingsTab_not_integrated.fix: In Admin.tsx: 1) import { SettingsTab } from './admin/SettingsTab'; 2) Add TabsTrigger value='settings' to sidebar under Settings section; 3) Add <TabsContent value='settings'><SettingsTab /></TabsContent>

hooks_violation.issue: useEffect called after conditional return in OrgAddressSection
hooks_violation.root_cause: Lines 27-39 have useEffect hooks but line 25 has 'if (isPlatformAdmin) return null' which causes early return before these hooks run
hooks_violation.fix: Move 'if (isPlatformAdmin) return null' to AFTER all useEffect calls (after line 39), OR restructure to not use early return
